summary: Verified inventory system improvements after production rollback. All 12 master categories working correctly. Backend APIs validated (categories, distribution, item creation with validation). Frontend UI verified (3 tabs, two-step Add/Transfer dialogs, Kit Completeness, Movement Log).

issues: React warning: Encountered two children with same key for duplicate item names (SSD Drive 1TB, IMU Set). This is a minor console warning, not a functional issue.

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Backend /api/categories returns all 12 categories with unique/non-unique classification
✓ Backend /api/items/distribution returns distribution matrix with all 12 master categories
✓ Backend POST /api/items rejects invalid categories with proper error message
✓ Backend POST /api/items requires item_name for UNIQUE categories (laptop, ssd, etc.)
✓ Backend POST /api/items auto-generates name for NON-UNIQUE categories (usb_hub, imu, etc.)
✓ Frontend shows only 3 tabs: Distribution, Kit Completeness, Movement Log
✓ Add Item dialog has two-step flow: Step 1 (Category) → Step 2 (Item ID for UNIQUE, Quantity for NON-UNIQUE)
✓ Transfer Item dialog has two-step flow with conditional rendering based on category type
✓ Kit Completeness shows all 12 master categories with standard composition reference
✓ Movement Log shows 'Moved by [User Name]' for each transfer entry
seed_data_creation: Created USB-HUB-BULK-2 item during testing (auto-generated name for non-unique category)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Inventory system fully verified. Key features: 1) 12 master categories (no General/Tools), 2) UNIQUE categories require item ID, NON-UNIQUE auto-generate names, 3) Two-step Add/Transfer dialogs, 4) 3 tabs only (Distribution, Kit Completeness, Movement Log), 5) Movement Log shows user attribution.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/categories returns 12 categories with unique/non-unique classification
Backend: GET /api/items/distribution returns distribution matrix with all 12 categories
Backend: POST /api/items requires item_name for UNIQUE category (laptop)
Backend: POST /api/items auto-generates name for NON-UNIQUE category (usb_hub)
Frontend: Inventory page loads with 3 tabs (Distribution, Kit Completeness, Movement Log)
Frontend: Distribution table shows all 12 category rows
Frontend: Add Item dialog shows 'Step 1: Select Category' with 12 options
Frontend: UNIQUE category (Laptop) shows 'Step 2: Item Code / ID' input
Frontend: NON-UNIQUE category (USB Hub) shows 'Step 2: Quantity' input
Frontend: Transfer dialog shows two-step flow with category-based conditional rendering
Frontend: Kit Completeness tab shows standard composition with all 12 categories
Frontend: Movement Log tab shows 'Moved by' user attribution
features_verified: Master Category System with fixed list of 12 categories
Unique vs Non-Unique item logic working correctly
Two-step Add Item flow (Category first, then conditional Item ID/Quantity)
Two-step Transfer flow with category-based item selection
UI Cleanup - Only 3 tabs visible (Distribution, Kit Completeness, Movement Log)
Backend requires item_name for UNIQUE categories
Backend auto-generates name for NON-UNIQUE categories
